description: 趙小七 — 感動到哭。雙手握拳，熱淚盈眶，嘴巴抿著。
prompt: anime style male cultivator, young man late teens, sky-blue themed disciple robes with cloud patterns, neat short black hair, deeply moved expression with tears streaming from closed eyes, fists clenched in emotion, trembling with admiration, half-body portrait, transparent background, solid magenta #FF00FF background
